properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v4 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Just like the desert needs the rain My life's a shoreline ready for waves Just like a fire burns with flame Is how my heart beats for Your name

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Where would I be without You? Where would I be without You? Where would I be without You Without Your love?

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Just the like the sunset needs the sky Where all of the colors come alive Just like a deep breath fills my lungs Is how my soul longs for Your love!

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Where would I be without You? Where would I be without You? Where would I be without You Without Your love? I cannot live without You I cannot live without You I cannot live without You Without Your love!

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Just like my sin needs the stripes And how my pride needs to die Just like my life needs the cross I have been raised with You, my God!

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: I cannot live without Your love, Your love Cannot live without Your love Where would I be without Your love?
